series_metadata.series_title: Ombudsman Designation and Service Review Process
series_metadata.series_description: Administration files on each of the 12 regional Ombudsman programs including performance evaluations, technical assistance plan and case records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three years in office and two years in records center, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain three years in office and two years in records center. then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
